info.name: EduSuite API — HR / LMS / SIS
info.description:
Complete test suite for the HR, LMS, and SIS modules.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman (VS Code extension or desktop app).
2. Set the **baseUrl** collection variable to `http://localhost:8081/api/v1` (already the default).
3. Run the **Auth / Login (Hogwarts)** request first — it automatically stores the access token and all seed UUIDs as collection variables.
4. All subsequent requests use `{{access_token}}` from the collection-level variable store.

## Tenant used
All requests authenticate as **Hogwarts School** (`hogwarts.edu`).
- Admin: `admin_hogwarts` / `password`
- Staff UUIDs, student UUIDs, section UUIDs, and course UUIDs all come from the seed data.

## Test order
Requests are ordered to be run top-to-bottom inside each folder. The write tests in each folder depend on reads completing first (IDs are captured by test scripts).
